title: Crema Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by claiming excess LP fees using manipulated tick data

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls claimLPFees() after a flash loan in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls claimLPFees() after a flash loan in the same tx
summary: Crema Finance was exploited using a flash loan to add liquidity and manipulate tick data to claim excess LP fees. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing calls to claimLPFees() immediately following a flash loan.
